title: sempervivum tectorum var. arvernense
intro: Sempervivum tectorum var. arvernense, also known as the arvernensis hens and chicks or the arvernensis houseleek, is a type of succulent plant in the Aeonium genus. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, this plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Sempervivum tectorum var. arvernense include reducing inflammation, soothing wounds, and relieving digestive problems. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and salves, which are often used to treat skin conditions, digestive issues, and respiratory problems.
